title: TFCobblemon (TerraFirmaCraft + Cobblemon)
description: Terrafirmacraft + Cobblemon integration mod. Adds several new items, crafting recipes, spawn presets, world generation, and custom Pokémon forms.
body:
Integration mod for TerraFirmaCraft and Cobblemon for Forge 1.20.1. Have you ever wished Cobblemon was more realistic? If so, this is the mod for you! Hunt Pokemon with spears, forage for tumblestones and apricorns to create Pokeballs, and infuse pottery with life to craft your first Pokemon. With this integration mod, you now have the ability to find and collect Pokemon in a completely new, realistic world. ## Features include: - 250 Pokémon spawns, each with new loot tables - Crafting recipes for Pokéballs, PC, Healing Machine, evolution items, and more - Natural medicines found in the wild and through cooking - Craftable Golett with the new Blank Orb item - Custom forms for Steelix and Scizor based around Wrought Iron and Black/Blue/Red Steel - Custom spawn presets for different biomes, climates, and seasons - Saltwater and freshwater Pokémon - Assets from 1.21, including Corphish, Sunflora, Spheal, Clauncher, and Corsola YouTube Trailer: [https://youtu.be/c2Q1lYUa7PI?si=UwZGxyz3ns530vDa](https://youtu.be/c2Q1lYUa7PI?si=UwZGxyz3ns530vDa)

Report issues here:[https://github.com/kingtrapinch/tfcobblemon/issues](https://github.com/kingtrapinch/tfcobblemon/issues) Join the discord: [https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1359192934251237386](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1359192934251237386)  Clay Golett made with a Fired Vessel and Life Orb: ![Picture of raw golett](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4877e81a4e018f7d7390f5711ac1c6c213c5f10a_0.webp) ## Advanced Features:
Added Items ![Added Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbd27d1e702cf91a4f37b75b29e3f17a7aeb9dff.png) - Blank Orb - Blank Orb (charging) - Raw Protector (smelt yellow-white to get Protector item) - Suspicious vessel (for each color of vessel)
Advanced Pokéball metal tiers: ![pokeball metal tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66743d35ee6712be98e627ee77c3c110e7c410b5.png)
Apricorn locations Apricorns drop from breaking tree leaves. You can get a higher yield by using a tool like a knife or scythe. The apricorn type depends on the tree species, and are grouped by climate.

Apricorn climate map (based on average temp and percipitation, values will overlap in-game)

![average apricorn climates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dce82ec9185aeb6ad0c6a04df075d13543659803.png)
Requires Kube.js to work. Needed for water-breathing and custom items to work properly.
